educationalNotes.detailed: Maps embeddings to class logits.
Represents the parameter difference (20,807,872) between the visualizer's simplified layer routing graph and the official Keras Applications parameter count.
educationalNotes.whyItMatters: Ensures model-level parameter math matches the sum of the individual layers exactly.
educationalNotes.keyTakeaway: Aligns the visual topology weights with Keras Applications measurements.
